name: Classic Yellow Duck
longDescription: Raised in the oldest tubs of Quackford, Classic Yellow still believes every bath is a small adventure. Reliable, cheerful, and impossible to dislike.

name: Captain Quack
tagline: Ready to helm the roughest bubbles.
longDescription: Captain Quack charted foam currents across seven bathrooms and one suspiciously large sink. Every voyage ends with a victorious splash.

name: Disco Feather
tagline: Brings the mirror-ball energy to every soak.
longDescription: Disco Feather was discovered under a spinning light in the city of Sudsville. This duck can turn quiet bath time into a full dance finale.

name: Lily Pad Louie
tagline: Calm on the surface, bold underneath.
longDescription: Louie spent years drifting between hidden garden ponds, mastering stillness and sudden action. He is the duck equivalent of a quiet hero.

name: Rose Gold River
tagline: A polished duck for the discerning collector.
longDescription: Rose Gold River trained in the grand spas of Highbubble Heights. Graceful and composed, this duck adds instant elegance to any shelf.

name: Midnight Quacker
tagline: Sleek, quiet, and a little dramatic.
longDescription: By moonlight, Midnight Quacker patrols the tub edge and keeps chaos in check. Mysterious, stylish, and always ready for a dramatic reveal.

name: Sprinkles McFloat
longDescription: Sprinkles McFloat once hosted a 72-hour bath party and never lost energy. This duck believes every splash deserves applause.

name: Trailblazer Tim
tagline: Built for puddles beyond the paved path.
longDescription: Tim mapped forgotten splash routes through rivers, puddles, and one gigantic rain barrel. He thrives where other ducks hesitate.

name: Bubble Tea Bella
tagline: Sweet, playful, and ready to celebrate.
longDescription: Bella was inspired by tea shop chatter and the joy of tiny pearls popping to the surface. She brings cozy vibes to every bath.

name: Storybook Sam
tagline: A gentle companion for everyday bath lore.
longDescription: Sam keeps a tiny notebook of heroic bath legends and bedtime tales. If you need a calm ending to your day, Sam is ready.
